---
# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.tagline | default: site.description }}

A backend engineer's blog and digital garden — written in Obsidian and published to this
static site by an automated pipeline. Posts carry a maturity (seedling / budding /
evergreen) and link to one another. Full post text is at {{ '/llms-full.txt' | absolute_url }}.

## Posts
{% assign _posts = site.posts | sort: 'date' | reverse -%}
{% for post in _posts %}
- [{{ post.title }}]({{ post.url | absolute_url }}){% if post.description %}: {{ post.description | strip_newlines }}{% endif %}
{%- endfor %}

## Projects
{% assign _projects = site.projects | sort: 'order' -%}
{% for project in _projects %}
- [{{ project.title }}]({{ project.url | absolute_url }}){% if project.description %}: {{ project.description | strip_newlines }}{% endif %}
{%- endfor %}
